task_completion.description: Verify the 'Dark mode: tab bar icons inverted...' issue is closed
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the issue 'Dark mode: tab bar icons inverted on Android 12 (Material You)' in the Redmine UI and check if its Status is 'Closed'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Offline mode: local changes lost...' issue is moved to 'v2.1 Hotfix' with the correct comment
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the issue 'Offline mode: local changes lost on sync conflict'. Check if its Target version is 'v2.1 Hotfix' and there is a comment starting with 'Deferred from v2.0 Release: too risky to ship...'.

task_completion.description: Verify 1.5 hours of Testing activity is logged for grace.lee on the 'Push notifications' issue
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the issue 'Push notifications not delivered when app is force-closed on iOS'. Check the time entries or history for 1.5 hours logged under 'Testing' activity for user 'grace.lee' with the comment 'Sprint review: verified push notification fix...'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Push notifications' issue status is updated to 'Resolved'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the issue 'Push notifications not delivered when app is force-closed on iOS' and check if its Status is 'Resolved'.

task_completion.description: Verify a new Feature issue 'v2.0 Release sprint closeout complete' is created with specified details
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a newly created Feature issue with Subject 'v2.0 Release sprint closeout complete', Priority 'Low', Status 'Closed', Assignee 'alice.chen', Target version 'v2.0 Release', and the description starting with 'Sprint closeout actions complete.'.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Redmine interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show terminal windows executing curl, sqlite3, or ruby scripts to modify the database directly.

integrity.description: The agent entered text into the actual web forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing comments and descriptions into the Redmine web forms, not just displaying the text in an editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project identifier: mobile-app-v2. Expected issue updates: 'Dark mode: tab bar icons inverted' status must be 'Closed'. 'Offline mode: local changes lost' target version must be 'v2.1 Hotfix'. 'Push notifications not delivered' status must be 'Resolved' and have 1.5 hours logged.
